title: NIKE TIEMPO 94
description: Nike Tiempo 94 Since 1994, football has changed. The game is faster, with dynamic full-field play essential for every player on the pitch. With this in mind, and with the input of athletes such as Carlos Tevez, Gerard Pique, and Ronaldinho, Nike Football melds the legacy of Tiempo with the needs of the modern game to create the best leather football boot to-date. The design of the Tiempo Legend V focuses on providing the lightest touch. Through enhanced fit and innovative materials, the Tiempo Legend V brings the upper closer to the foot and solves an age-old problem with leather — increased weight through water absorption. With the development of a new upper, comprised of two trimmed down layers, the Tiempo Legend V mimics the touch and lightweight feel of a synthetic and is built on the same anatomical last as the revolutionary Nike Hypervenom to bring the foot closer to the ball. With: Nike Global Brand Design

title: NIKE RUNNING / NTL
description: Nike Running / NTL Refitted in 2008, Niketown London's Running Pavilion was also created while working at Nike sharing the same floor as the Bootroom. This was created internally at Nike EMEA Brand design for Running. Gait analyses are done in the Running Lab area. It is an essential tool to recommend the best shoe for the consumer. Besides determining what type of pronator the consumer is, they can experience Nike+ audio feedback as well. The Nike Running Club area is the hub of the running pavilion. Both mens and womens side have a dedicated space where store staff and visitors can meet and discuss running, product, nikeplus.com and events. title: MLLER SKATEBOARDS
description: Mller Skateboards We create limited edition hand made skateboards. Each are made from rare and exotic materials from an old lumber yard with no name that is equally as weird as our mill. We pick out as much crazy wood as we strap to our bikes and ride back to the mill. Each deck is made uniquely based on however Simon is feeling that day, so each one is completely unique of course. These little guys take some time to make because it is all done by hand. Everything is cut, shaped, and finished using rusty tools and four pairs of average eyes. There is no big machine named "Betsy" that bashes out skateboards - just some time and hard work to chase down our youth. We are totally about creating something beautiful and fun. For a few minutes you a can fly freely with a warm sun and a smile on your face. Mller Skateboards We create limited edition hand made skateboards. Each are made from rare and exotic materials from an old lumber yard with no name that is equally as weird as our mill. We pick out as much crazy wood as we strap to our bikes and ride back to the mill. Each deck is made uniquely based on however Simon is feeling that day, so each one is completely unique of course. These little guys take some time to make because it is all done by hand. Everything is cut, shaped, and finished using rusty tools and four pairs of average eyes. There is no big machine named "Betsy" that bashes out skateboards - just some time and hard work to chase down our youth. We are totally about creating something beautiful and fun. For a few minutes you a can fly freely with a warm sun and a smile on your face.

title: NIKE AF-100 ZINE
description: A commemorative publication celebrating Air Force 1's 35-year legacy through contributions from visionary designers including Virgil Abloh, Travis Scott, and Don C.

title: NIKE AIR FORCE 1 GENEALOGY
description: A retrospective design study tracing the Air Force 1's evolution from its 1983 origins through Bruce Kilgore's iconic silhouette and material refinement.

title: NIKE AIR MAX GENEALOGY
description: A comprehensive visual history mapping Air Max innovation from the 1979 Tailwind through contemporary models, documenting Tinker Hatfield's design evolution.

title: NIKE FA18 LOOKBOOK
description: A Fall 2018 digital lookbook presenting Nike's technical apparel collections with advanced knit and woven materials and functional layering.

title: NIKE GENEALOGY OF INNOVATION
description: An interactive experience documenting 40+ years of Nike design across 200+ silhouettes, spanning 1971 to present with designer interviews and cultural context.

title: NIKE LDV
description: A revitalized release of Nike's legendary Long Distance Vector running shoe worn by K2 mountaineers in 1978, reimagined for contemporary performance.

title: NIKE WC 2018 ZINE
description: A publication created to celebrate Nike's 2018 FIFA World Cup campaign, showcasing the brand's global football strategy and athlete stories.

title: NIKE X ROC NATION SB
description: A collaboration between Nike SB and Roc Nation exploring the intersection of sneaker culture and hip-hop heritage through specialized skateboard footwear.

title: OLD SPACES
description: A photographic series documenting architectural spaces, interiors, and environments. The images capture the character and atmosphere of aging structures, reflecting an ongoing interest in architecture, materiality, and the passage of time.

title: PAINTINGS
description: A collection of original paintings exploring color, form, and texture. These works reflect a fine art practice developed through studies at Carnegie Mellon University (BFA, Painting) and Yale University (MA, Painting), where the investigation of painting as a medium with its own complex syntax and history was central to the program.

title: PAINTINGS II
description: A second series of original paintings continuing the exploration of abstraction, color relationships, and material process. The work bridges formal art education — MFA studies at Yale and Carnegie Mellon — with ongoing studio practice alongside a career in commercial design.

title: SCULPTURES
description: A collection of original paintings exploring color, form, and texture. These works reflect a fine art practice developed through studies at Carnegie Mellon University (BFA, Painting) and Yale University (MA, Painting), where the investigation of painting as a medium with its own complex syntax and history was central to the program.

title: SHOE SURGEON
description: A collaboration with legendary custom sneaker artist Dominic Ciambrone exploring bespoke footwear modification and the boundaries between customization and original design.

title: TOM
description: Brand identity and design for TOM, a creative project exploring visual identity and graphic design language.

title: UNUSED CONCEPTS
description: A collection of unreleased design concepts and exploratory work documenting creative directions that evolved beyond initial execution.

title: VIRGIL ABLOH
description: Collaborative design work with Virgil Abloh exploring deconstructed sneaker aesthetics, including contributions to The Ten project's revolutionary approach to Nike silhouette reimagining.

title: YAAYAS
description: YAAYAS This brand is inspired by a simple belief: A party for every body each day. YAAYAS is driven by a passion for art, fun and luxury combined with everyday cleansing and fragrance products. A global, beauty care brand for the luxury market. This brand is inspired by a simple belief: A party for every body each day. YAAYAS is driven by a passion for art, fun and luxury combined with everyday cleansing and fragrance products. A global, beauty care brand for the luxury market.The YAAYAS juxtaposes luxury and fun within materials,language and visuals. We envision how a birthday party meets Coco Chanel under the shower. This product and brand development is being created and sold exclusively by The Invisible Party
